payload.summary: Wave 7 (F8) verified: 845 pass / 0 fail asserted directly, tsc clean. import --from-ccpm proven against real speed-count-game data (1 epic + 6 tasks -> 7 items, PRD relocated status-stripped, 0 unmappable, validate exit 0, re-run byte-identical). Real quirks handled: issue-number filenames, analysis-file exclusion, prose titles slugified, PRD already at docs/prds with status:complete.
